home.title: Your Notes
home.emptySubtitle:
Write down what she likes or dislikes
at each restaurant — we'll remind you!

textPlaceholderVariants: Leave a tiny clue for future you...
Write one quick thing before it escapes...
Anything here worth saving for later?
capture.savedMsg: We'll remind you next time you're here!
capture.savedLocalMsg: Your note is saved on this device. Enable reminders to get notified when you revisit this place.
capture.reminderDisclosureMsg: Noto uses your location in the background to notice when you return to a saved place, even when the app is closed or not on screen. We only use this to trigger your note reminders.
capture.remindersEnabledMsg: Noto will remind you when you return to saved places.
capture.remindersUnavailableMsg: Your note is still saved locally. Noto needs background location and notifications to send reminders.
capture.noText: Please write a note or add a doodle
capture.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to take photos
capture.cameraUnavailableHint: This can happen on a simulator or when the camera session gets stuck. Try again or use a physical device.
capture.promptPlaceholder: Answer in one line if you want
capture.photoLibraryPermissionMsg: Allow photo library access so you can import an image into this note.
capture.photoLibraryPermissionSettingsMsg: Photo library access is blocked for Noto. Open Settings to import from your library.
capture.photoImportFailed: We could not import that photo right now.

map.nearbyEmpty: No nearby notes match your filters
map.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try another filter combination or reset to view all notes
map.androidUnavailableTitle: Map is temporarily unavailable on Android
map.androidUnavailableSubtitle: This build skips Google Maps on Android until the API key is configured.
map.emptyTitle: No notes on the map yet
map.emptySubtitle: Your saved notes will appear as pins here

noteDetail.deleteMsg: This note and its reminder will be permanently removed.
noteDetail.deleteErrorMsg: Unable to delete this note right now. Please try again.
noteDetail.deleteWarningMsg: This note was removed from your device, but the shared copy could not be removed yet.
noteDetail.editingHint: Editing mode: update note, doodle, and place
noteDetail.doodleEmpty: Add a tiny doodle to this memory.
noteDetail.doodleSaveErrorMsg: Please try again in a moment.
noteDetail.updateWarningMsg: This note was updated on your device, but the shared copy could not be refreshed yet.

shared.sectionSubtitle: Invite a few people and share notes right from Home.
shared.unavailableBody: This build does not have shared social enabled right now.
shared.signInTitle: Sign in to connect with friends
shared.signInBody: Connect your account to invite and join friends on Home.
shared.emptyFriendsBody: Share one invite link and your notes with friends will start showing up here.
shared.emptyPostsBody: Shared notes will appear here as soon as either of you posts one.
shared.deleteBody: This shared post will be removed for everyone in the feed.
shared.manageBody: Invite someone once, then keep your circle tidy here.
shared.inviteFirstBody: One invite link is all you need to start sharing notes from Home.
shared.inviteReadyBody: Share this link with a friend to connect.
shared.emptyManageBody: No one is connected yet. Share an invite to get started.
shared.savedSharedBody: This note is in your journal and has been shared with your friends on Home.
shared.savedLocalOnlyBody: Your note is saved locally. Invite a friend first to share notes from Home.
shared.sharePublishFailedBody: Your note is safe in your journal, but we could not share it with your friends right now.
shared.removeFriendBody: This friend will stop seeing the moments you share from Home.
shared.joinBody: Paste the invite link to connect and start sharing on Home.
shared.joinPrompt: Paste the invite link your friend sent.
shared.joinSignInBody: Sign in first so we can connect you to this friend.
shared.joinFooterBody: We'll connect you as soon as this invite checks out.
shared.joinErrorBody: Paste a valid invite link to connect.
shared.joinSuccessBody: You can now share notes with this friend from Home.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearAllMsg: All your food notes will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.accountSignedOutMsg: Sign in to back up your notes and keep them synced across your devices.
settings.accountUnavailableMsg: Account sign-in is unavailable right now. Your notes stay safely on this device.
settings.autoSyncOnDetail: Your notes sync automatically while you are signed in.
settings.autoSyncRetry: We could not sync right now. We will try again when the app is active.
settings.syncPendingOffline: Your notes are saved locally and will sync when you are back online.
settings.offlineReadOnly: You are offline right now. Cloud sync will resume when you reconnect.
settings.syncBlockedDetail: Some notes need your attention before they can finish syncing.
settings.syncRetryQueued: Some notes are queued to retry syncing automatically.
settings.syncDetail: Upload your latest local notes to your signed-in account.
settings.syncSignInMsg: Connect your account before syncing notes.
settings.syncUnavailableMsg: Cloud sync is not available in this build.
settings.syncFailedMsg: Unable to sync with the server right now. Please try again later.
settings.syncNetworkMsg: Unable to reach the server right now. Check your connection and try again.
settings.syncSessionExpiredMsg: Your sign-in session expired. Sign out and sign back in to resume sync.
settings.syncPolicyDeniedMsg: The server denied access to sync your notes. Sign in again and try once more.
settings.syncPhotoTooLargeMsg: A photo is too large to sync safely. Retake it with a lower resolution, then try again.
settings.syncBlockedRetryMsg: This note could not be synced after multiple attempts. Edit it and try again.
settings.localModeDetail: This build is ready to use offline. Optional sync can be added later without changing your local notes.
settings.plusHint: Unlock unlimited photo notes and library import.
settings.plusActiveHint: Unlimited photo notes and library import unlocked.
settings.plusUnavailable: Plus is coming soon to this build.
settings.about: So you never forget what she likes 💛
settings.privacyPolicyHint: Review how Noto handles your data and permissions.
settings.supportHint: Contact support if sign-in, sync, or account issues need a hand.
settings.accountDeletionHint: Open the external deletion page or support contact for your store listing.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage the account connected to Noto.
profile.name: Name
profile.autoSyncOn: Your notes sync automatically while you are signed in.
profile.syncRetryHint: We could not sync right now. We will try again when the app is active.
profile.syncPendingOffline: Your notes are saved locally and will sync when you are back online.
profile.syncBlockedHint: Some notes need attention before sync can finish.
profile.syncSignedOut: Sign in to back up your notes and keep them synced across your devices.
profile.syncHint: Use Settings to sync your local notes with the server.
profile.signedOutMsg: Sign in to back up your notes and keep them synced across your devices.
profile.unavailableMsg: Account sign-in is unavailable right now, but your notes stay safely on this device.
profile.deleteAccountUnavailable: Sign in to delete this account.
profile.deleteAccountNotReady: Account deletion is not configured for this build yet. Please contact support.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMsg: This permanently deletes your account, cloud sync data, shared posts, invites, and notes stored for this account. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: We could not delete your account right now. Please try again in a moment.
profile.deleteAccountNeedsSupportMsg: This build could not finish the deletion automatically. You can continue from our deletion page or contact support.
profile.deleteAccountSuccessMsg: Your Noto account and synced data have been deleted from this device and the cloud.

auth.title: Noto
auth.subtitle: So you never forget what she likes
auth.shareSubtitle: Sign in to share this note
auth.landingHint: Choose the easiest way to keep your notes backed up and ready everywhere.
auth.emailDescription: Sign in to keep your notes backed up and synced automatically.
auth.emailShareDescription: Sign in to share this note.
auth.registerDescription: Save your notes, keep them backed up, and sync everywhere.
auth.resetDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.offlineBody: Sign-in and account recovery need a connection. You can still keep using local mode.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.resetPasswordSent: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now.
auth.signUpFailed: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again later.
auth.validationPasswordLength: Use at least 6 characters for your password.
auth.unavailablePlatform: Account sign-in is unavailable on this platform in the current build.
auth.unavailableFirebase: Account sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.unavailableGeneric: Account sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.errorWrongCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
auth.errorEmailInUse: That email is already being used by another account.
auth.errorWeakPassword: Choose a password with at least 6 characters.
auth.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts right now. Please try again in a bit.
auth.errorNetwork: Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorProviderConflict: This email is already linked to a different sign-in method.
auth.errorPlayServices: Google Play Services are unavailable on this device.
auth.errorGoogleConfig: Google sign-in is not configured correctly for this build yet.
auth.errorMissingGoogleToken: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.
auth.devModeMsg: Google sign-in in this build only stores your account on this device. Cloud sync can be connected later.
auth.localModeMsg: This build is using local-first mode. You can keep capturing notes without signing in.
auth.signInFailed: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.

onboarding.subtitle1:
Write it down before you forget!
Noto helps you remember her food preferences at every restaurant.
onboarding.subtitle2: Next time you arrive at that restaurant, you'll get a notification with your notes — no more "anh chả thương em" moments!
onboarding.subtitle3: Because remembering no onions in her phở is how you say "I love you".

notification.title: Nearby reminder
notification.body: A note is ready when you open Noto.
notification.channelDescription: Location-based reminders for notes you saved in Noto.
notification.photoBody: A memory from here is waiting.
titleVariantsWithLocation: A saved note is waiting at {{location}}
titleVariantsGeneric: You just passed an old note
textBodyVariants: A note from this place is waiting when you open Noto.
Open Noto to see what you wanted to remember here.
There is a saved note here if you want a quick reminder.
A small memory from this place is ready when you are.
Your past self left a note here for a reason.
photoBodyVariants: A memory from here is waiting.
There is a photo memory from this place waiting for you.
You left a little snapshot here.
A saved moment from this place is ready to revisit.
This place is holding on to one of your memories.

widget.idleText: The right note will appear when you're nearby.
widget.modeShared: A shared memory from someone close.

plus.title: Noto Plus
plus.subtitle: Elevate your memory journal

features.unlimitedDesc: Free plan is limited to 10 photo notes. Plus lets you save every moment without limits.
features.libraryDesc: Unlock the ability to import existing photos from your library into your notes.
features.syncDesc: Keep your notes safe and synced across all your devices automatically.
features.radiusDesc: Fine-tune exactly when you want to be reminded as you approach a place.

plus.libraryMessage: Import from Photos is part of Plus.
plus.limitMessage: Free includes 10 photo notes. Plus unlocks more.
plus.upgradeSuccessMessage: You can now import from Photos and save more photo notes.
plus.upgradeUnavailableMessage: Purchase unavailable right now. Try again later.
plus.restoreSuccessMessage: Plus is active on this device.
plus.offlineBody: Your last known plan is still visible, but purchases and restores need a connection.
